_help: Planning overlay applied by build-ledger.mjs. Per file: classification (PORT|NO-COUNTERPART|REVIEW-CLASS), tsFile, planningNote. Per item: state (PENDING|NO-COUNTERPART only - planning never sets APPLIED/ESCALATED), tsFunction, functionGroup (optional override), rationale (required iff state=NO-COUNTERPART). The optional `reconstruction` section declares v26-baseline reconstruction items (id must contain "#recon/"); each needs spec, blocks (>=1 hunk id), tsFile, tsFunction. Edit THIS file, never ledger.json; then re-run build-ledger.mjs.

src/spicelib/devices/isrc/Makefile.am.planningNote: Automake libisrc_la_SOURCES fragment. Case (a) C-language artifact per PLANNING.md §5: digiTS has no autotools build; components register via src/core/registry.ts. The single hunk only drops the deleted isrcdest.c and isrcmdel.c entries from the source list - both themselves NO-COUNTERPART.

src/spicelib/devices/isrc/isrc.c.planningNote: IFparm ISRCpTable[] parameter-name/id table. digiTS keys params by name string (defineModelParams in dc-current-source.ts and ac-current-source.ts) and exposes no integer-id IFparm table. h001 is the author-line comment header (NO-COUNTERPART). h002/h003 reshuffle the parameter table: add the `c`/`current` readout aliases, move `sine` from a plain IOP to an IOPR redirect of `sin`, and change `external` from IF_REALVEC to IF_STRING. No IFparm registration API exists in digiTS, so the table-row plumbing has no counterpart; the `current` instance readout it advertises is realized structurally by AcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl.getPinCurrents (no separate ISRCcurrent member/ask path).

src/spicelib/devices/isrc/isrcacct.c.planningNote: ISRCaccept - transient breakpoint scheduling for the coeff-array PULSE waveform. digiTS implements transient (analysis-scope.md); the breakpoint-scheduling counterpart is AcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl.acceptStep / nextBreakpoint. h001 is the author-line comment (NO-COUNTERPART). h002-h005 are the ISRCnextModel/ISRCinstances accessor-macro renames plus the v41 PULSE-PHASE compatibility rework (newcompat.xs branch and the `else if (PHASE>0) tmax = PHASE*PER` pulse-count gating) inside the coeff-array PULSE breakpoint logic. digiTS schedules breakpoints for its own square/triangle/sawtooth/noise set, NOT for the ngspice ISRCcoeffs[]/ISRCfunctionOrder PULSE engine - that engine is the absent v26 baseline, so the PULSE-breakpoint hunks are blocked by isrc#recon/coeffWaveforms.

src/spicelib/devices/isrc/isrcacld.c.planningNote: ISRCacLoad - AC small-signal RHS stamp. AC is implemented engine-wide (analysis-scope.md: ac-analysis.ts, defaultStampAcHandler, optional AnalogElement.stampAc hook). AcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl.stampAc already exists (ac-current-source.ts:399-427) and stamps m·acReal/m·acImag at ±pos/±neg with m≡1. The single hunk h001 adds (1) the accessor-macro renames, (2) the `m = here->ISRCmValue` multiplier applied at each stamp - absent in digiTS (no `m` param), blocked by isrc#recon/parallelMultiplier, and (3) the MODEACNOISE / noise_input branch that injects a unit excitation for the AC-noise driving source - this is part of noise analysis (OUT per analysis-scope.md) and is split out as NO-COUNTERPART.

src/spicelib/devices/isrc/isrcask.c.planningNote: ISRCask - SPICE IFparm value getter (returns ISRCcurrent for ISRC_CURRENT, no-op for ISRC_EXTERNAL). Case (a) C-language artifact per PLANNING.md §5: digiTS has no IFparm ask API - parameter readout is via class accessors / getPinCurrents, not an integer-keyed ask switch. The single hunk only reshapes the XSPICE/SHARED_MODULE preprocessor guards around the ISRC_CURRENT and ISRC_EXTERNAL cases; no surviving digiTS-visible behavior.

src/spicelib/devices/isrc/isrcdefs.h.planningNote: Instance/model structs + source-function-type macros + parameter-id constants. The digiTS counterpart is the AcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl / DcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl instance fields plus the param defs. h001 is the author-line comment (NO-COUNTERPART). h002 embeds `struct GENinstance gen` and lifts ISRCmodPtr/ISRCnextInstance/ISRCname/ISRCstate to GEN-macro accessors, qualifies node ids `const`, and unguards the ISRCcurrent member - C struct mechanics + the ISRCcurrent readout field (realized via getPinCurrents in digiTS). h003 embeds `struct GENmodel gen` and converts the source-type #defines (PULSE..EXTERNAL) and the device-parameter #defines (ISRC_DC..ISRC_EXTERNAL) to enums - byte-identical numeric values, C-preprocessor reformat. No StatePool slot in digiTS isrc (the source stamps RHS-only, no state); the only behavioral field is ISRCcurrent.

src/spicelib/devices/isrc/isrcdel.c.planningNote: ISRCdelete - C-heap free. Case (a) C-language artifact per PLANNING.md §5: digiTS is GC-managed; no allocator, no destructor, no model-instance linked list. The v41 hunk rewrites the linked-list-unlink delete into a per-instance FREE of ISRCcoeffs/trnoise/trrandom state - all heap bookkeeping with no digiTS counterpart.

src/spicelib/devices/isrc/isrcdest.c.planningNote: ISRCdestroy - C-heap free loop releasing every ISRCmodel and ISRCinstance. Case (a) C-language artifact per PLANNING.md §5: digiTS is GC-managed; no explicit destructor. Whole file deleted in v41.

src/spicelib/devices/isrc/isrcext.h.planningNote: C extern-prototype header. Case (a) C-language artifact per PLANNING.md §5: digiTS has no prototype headers - signatures are TypeScript class members. The single hunk only rewrites the ISRCdelete prototype and removes the ISRCdestroy/ISRCmDelete prototypes (the deleted C-heap functions); no surviving declaration has a digiTS analogue.

src/spicelib/devices/isrc/isrcinit.c.planningNote: SPICEdev ISRCinfo registration dispatch struct, converted to C99 designated initialisers. digiTS registration is the DcCurrentSourceDefinition / AcCurrentSourceDefinition objects; method binding is the element classes. Reviewed per the PLANNING.md §4 registration-glue note - the single hunk h001 reformats the whole struct. Every function-pointer slot that is non-NULL in v26 stays non-NULL in v41; the only non-cosmetic changes are DEVdestroy/DEVmodDelete set to NULL (the deleted heap functions) and the addition of explicit .DEVinstSize/.DEVmodSize designators - no new parameter slot, no changed default, no new device capability.

src/spicelib/devices/isrc/isrcload.c.planningNote: ISRCload - transient/DC RHS stamp + the coeff-array waveform evaluation engine (PULSE/SINE/EXP/SFFM/AM/PWL/TRNOISE/TRRANDOM driven by ISRCcoeffs[]/ISRCfunctionOrder). digiTS implements DC-OP and transient (analysis-scope.md); the RHS-only stamp maps to AcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl.load / DcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl.load. h001 is the compatmode include (NO-COUNTERPART). h002 is the accessor-macro rename of the model/instance walk. h003-h013 are the per-waveform evaluation bodies (PULSE phase rework, SINE/SFFM/AM phase unification, PWL paren cleanup) - these target the ngspice coeff-array waveform engine, which digiTS does NOT implement (its waveforms are its own sine/square/triangle/sawtooth/expression/sweep/am/fm/noise set, not ISRCcoeffs-driven); blocked by isrc#recon/coeffWaveforms. h014 is the TRNOISE timezero-reset rework, blocked by the same reconstruction. h015 records `here->ISRCcurrent = m*value` - the m multiplier (blocked by isrc#recon/parallelMultiplier) folded with the ISRCcurrent readout.

src/spicelib/devices/isrc/isrcmdel.c.planningNote: ISRCmDelete - C-heap free unlinking an ISRCmodel and freeing its instances. Case (a) C-language artifact per PLANNING.md §5: digiTS is GC-managed; no model destructor, no model linked list. Whole file deleted in v41.

src/spicelib/devices/isrc/isrcpar.c.planningNote: ISRCparam - instance parameter application (the IFparm setter). digiTS applies params via the constructor + setParam reading the property bag, not an integer-keyed setter switch. h001 is a `switch(param)` whitespace-only edit (NO-COUNTERPART). h002 adds /* FALLTHROUGH */ comments to the ISRC_AC vector-parse cases - the AC mag/phase parse (acMag/acPhase + given-flags) is a real behavioral counterpart of ac-current-source.ts acMagnitude/acPhase. h003/h004 add `trnoise_state_free`/`tfree` of the prior state before re-init on an `alter` - this is part of the coeff-array TRNOISE/TRRANDOM waveform engine that digiTS does not implement (blocked by isrc#recon/coeffWaveforms).

src/spicelib/devices/isrc/isrctemp.c.planningNote: ISRCtemp - per-instance temperature/default-value processing pass. Maps to AcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl constructor/setParam (the acMag=1 / acPhase=0 defaulting on a bare AC token is already implemented at ac-current-source.ts:309-312). h001 is the accessor-macro rename of the model/instance walk. h002 reworks the no-value diagnostics: the bare `no value, DC 0 assumed` ERR_WARNING->ERR_INFO downgrade maps onto digiTS default-current handling, but the new `dc value used for op instead of transient time=0 value` warning compares the DC value against the transient time-0 value drawn from ISRCcoeffs[] (the coeff-array waveform engine) - that comparison path depends on the absent coeff engine, so h002 is blocked by isrc#recon/coeffWaveforms.

isrc/Makefile.am#h001.rationale: Automake source-list fragment. C build system; digiTS registers via src/core/registry.ts and has no autotools build. PLANNING.md §5 case (a). The hunk only removes the isrcdest.c and isrcmdel.c entries - both themselves NO-COUNTERPART (deleted C-heap files).

isrc/isrc.c#h001.rationale: Author-line file-header comment context only; the @@ hunk header carries the `Author: 1987 Thomas L. Quarles` comment. The actual changed lines are the IFparm ISRCpTable rows in h002/h003. This stanza is the parser's header-attributed slice and carries no code; PLANNING.md §5 case (a) C source comment with no behavioral content.

isrc/isrc.c#h002.rationale: IFparm ISRCpTable parameter-name/id table rows. digiTS has no IFparm registration table - params are keyed by name string via defineModelParams. This hunk adds the `c` current alias (IOPPR), reorders the `sine`/`sin` aliases (IOPR redirect), and changes `external` from IF_REALVEC to IF_STRING. The parser-flag/redirect plumbing (IOPPR/IOPR/IF_STRING) has no digiTS counterpart; the `current` readout it advertises is realized structurally by getPinCurrents, not a table row. PLANNING.md §5 case (a) C dispatch-table plumbing.

isrc/isrc.c#h003.rationale: Continuation of the IFparm ISRCpTable rewrite: relocates the `c` (ISRC_DC) and `current` (ISRC_CURRENT) readout rows out of the XSPICE #ifdef into the unconditional table. Same as h002 - IFparm table plumbing with no digiTS registration-table counterpart; the `current`/`v`/`p` readouts are computed by element accessors, not advertised through an IFparm row. PLANNING.md §5 case (a).

isrc/isrcacct.c#h001.rationale: Adds `#include "ngspice/compatmode.h"`. C include-directive plumbing supporting the newcompat.xs branch in h002-h005; digiTS has no compatmode header. PLANNING.md §5 case (a) C-language artifact.

isrc/isrcacct.c#h002.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-current-source.ts AcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl.acceptStep (PULSE breakpoint scheduling, reconstructed by isrc#recon/coeffWaveforms)

isrc/isrcacct.c#h003.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-current-source.ts AcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl.acceptStep (PULSE PHASE/newcompat.xs rework, reconstructed by isrc#recon/coeffWaveforms)

isrc/isrcacct.c#h004a.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-current-source.ts AcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl.acceptStep PULSE head (PER/PHASE coeff reads, time = CKTtime - TD, tshift = TD; reconstructed by isrc#recon/coeffWaveforms)

isrc/isrcacct.c#h004b.rationale: Frozen sub-item of the isrcacct.c#h004 split: the newcompat.xs compatibility-mode PULSE-phase arm — the removed XSPICE phase-normalization block and the added `if (newcompat.xs) { phase=PHASE/360; phase=fmod(phase,1); deltat=phase*PER; while(deltat>0) deltat-=PER; time+=deltat; tshift=TD-deltat; } else if (PHASE>0.0) { tmax=PHASE*PER; }` plus the `if (!newcompat.xs && time > tmax) {/*nothing*/} else {` gate. newcompat is ngspice's emulation of foreign SPICE dialects (PSPICE/LTspice/HSPICE/Spice2-3, ngspice/compatmode.h), gated by `set ngbehavior`/`.option`; it only changes the PULSE phase convention when a compat flag is set. digiTS has no compat-mode system (no ngbehavior/.option parser, no newcompat global; grep across src/ = zero hits) and foreign-dialect emulation is out of scope for a browser logic-sim. NO-COUNTERPART matching the ratified VSRC precedent (vsrcload.c#h004 carved out NO-COUNTERPART for the same newcompat.xs construct). The non-compat baseline PULSE breakpoint logic is the portable path and lands via the coeff engine in the #h004a/#h004c portable sub-items.

isrc/isrcacct.c#h004c.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-current-source.ts AcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl.acceptStep PULSE breakpoint body (period-fold + the four-region SAMETIME CKTsetBreak chain; reconstructed by isrc#recon/coeffWaveforms)

isrc/isrcacct.c#h005.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-current-source.ts AcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl.acceptStep (ISRC fftFree debug-string fix at end of ISRCaccept; lands with the reconstructed coeff-array accept path, isrc#recon/coeffWaveforms)

isrc/isrcask.c#h001.rationale: ISRCask is the SPICE IFparm value getter (integer-keyed `which` switch returning ISRCcurrent for ISRC_CURRENT, no-op for ISRC_EXTERNAL). digiTS has no IFparm ask API - parameter readout is via element accessors / getPinCurrents, not an ask switch. PLANNING.md §5 case (a) C dispatch artifact. The hunk only reshapes the XSPICE/SHARED_MODULE preprocessor guards around the two cases.

isrc/isrcdefs.h#h001.rationale: sISRCinstance head rewrite: replaces the hand-rolled ISRCmodPtr/ISRCnextInstance/ISRCname/ISRCstate members with `struct GENinstance gen` embedding + GEN-macro accessor #defines, and adds `const` qualifiers to the node ids. C struct-layout + generic-struct-embedding mechanics; digiTS instances are TypeScript classes with no GENinstance base, no linked-list pointers, no IFuid name field. PLANNING.md §5 case (a). The one behavioral member nearby (ISRCcurrent) is covered by h002.

isrc/isrcdefs.h#h002.rationale: Unguards the ISRCcurrent member (removes its XSPICE #ifdef) and rewrites the sISRCmodel head to embed `struct GENmodel gen` with GEN-macro accessors. The ISRCcurrent readout is realized in digiTS by AcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl.getPinCurrents (computed I, not a stored struct member); the rest is C generic-struct-embedding mechanics. No StatePool slot exists for isrc (RHS-only stamp, no state). PLANNING.md §5 case (a) struct-layout artifact.

isrc/isrcdefs.h#h003.rationale: Converts the source-function-type macros (PULSE..EXTERNAL) and the device-parameter id macros (ISRC_DC..ISRC_EXTERNAL) from #define to C enum, with byte-identical numeric values. Pure C-preprocessor reformat of integer ids that key the IFparm dispatch table; digiTS has no IFparm id namespace (params are name-keyed). PLANNING.md §5 case (a). The source-type ids drive the coeff-array waveform engine, which is reconstructed by isrc#recon/coeffWaveforms - but the enum-vs-#define id constants themselves have no digiTS representation.

isrc/isrcdel.c#h001.rationale: ISRCdelete rewritten from a linked-list-unlink-and-FREE into a per-instance FREE of ISRCcoeffs / trnoise_state / trrandom_state. Case (a) C-language artifact per PLANNING.md §5: digiTS is GC-managed; no heap free, no destructor, no instance linked list. Every line of the new and old body is C heap bookkeeping.

isrc/isrcdest.c#h001.rationale: Whole-file deletion of ISRCdestroy, a C-heap free loop releasing every ISRCmodel and ISRCinstance. Case (a) C-language artifact per PLANNING.md §5: digiTS is GC-managed; no explicit destructor.

isrc/isrcext.h#h001.rationale: C extern-prototype header. Case (a) C-language artifact per PLANNING.md §5: digiTS has no prototype headers - signatures are TypeScript class members. The hunk rewrites the ISRCdelete prototype to the GENinstance* signature and removes the ISRCdestroy/ISRCmDelete prototypes (deleted heap functions); no surviving declaration maps to digiTS.

isrc/isrcinit.c#h001.rationale: SPICEdev ISRCinfo dispatch struct converted to C99 designated initialisers. digiTS registration is the DcCurrentSourceDefinition / AcCurrentSourceDefinition objects; method binding is the element classes. Reviewed per PLANNING.md §4 registration-glue note: every non-NULL function-pointer slot in v26 stays non-NULL in v41 (DEVparam/DEVload/DEVtemperature/DEVacLoad/DEVaccept/DEVask), the only changes are DEVdestroy/DEVmodDelete set to NULL (deleted heap functions) and the cosmetic .DEVinstSize/.DEVmodSize designators. No new parameter slot, no changed default, no new device capability. PLANNING.md §5 case (a) dispatch glue.

isrc/isrcload.c#h001.rationale: Adds `#include "ngspice/compatmode.h"`. C include-directive plumbing supporting the newcompat.xs PULSE branch in h003-h005; digiTS has no compatmode header. PLANNING.md §5 case (a) C-language artifact.

isrc/isrcload.c#h002.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-current-source.ts AcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl.load / src/components/sources/dc-current-source.ts DcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl.load (model/instance linked-list-walk accessor-macro renames; the surrounding RHS-only srcFact stamp is the existing digiTS load body)

isrc/isrcload.c#h003.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-current-source.ts AcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl.load PULSE waveform evaluation (reconstructed by isrc#recon/coeffWaveforms)

isrc/isrcload.c#h004a.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-current-source.ts AcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl.load PULSE head (time -= TD; the PHASE coeff read context; reconstructed by isrc#recon/coeffWaveforms)

isrc/isrcload.c#h004b.rationale: Frozen sub-item of the isrcload.c#h004 split: the newcompat.xs compatibility-mode PULSE-phase value arm — the removed XSPICE phase-normalization block and the added `if (newcompat.xs) { phase=PHASE/360; phase=fmod(phase,1); deltat=phase*PER; while(deltat>0) deltat-=PER; time+=deltat; } else if (PHASE>0.0) { tmax=PHASE*PER; }` plus the `if (!newcompat.xs && time > tmax) { value=V1; } else {` gate. newcompat is ngspice's emulation of foreign SPICE dialects (PSPICE/LTspice/HSPICE/Spice2-3, ngspice/compatmode.h), gated by `set ngbehavior`/`.option`; it only changes the PULSE phase convention when a compat flag is set. digiTS has no compat-mode system (no ngbehavior/.option parser, no newcompat global; grep across src/ = zero hits) and foreign-dialect emulation is out of scope for a browser logic-sim. NO-COUNTERPART matching the ratified VSRC precedent (vsrcload.c#h004 carved out NO-COUNTERPART for the same newcompat.xs construct). The non-compat baseline PULSE value path is the portable path and lands via the coeff engine in the #h004a/#h004c portable sub-items.

isrc/isrcload.c#h004c.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-current-source.ts AcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl.load PULSE value piecewise (period-fold + V1/rise/V2/fall by time region; reconstructed by isrc#recon/coeffWaveforms)

isrc/isrcload.c#h005.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-current-source.ts AcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl.load PULSE value piecewise (reconstructed by isrc#recon/coeffWaveforms)

isrc/isrcload.c#h006.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-current-source.ts AcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl.load SINE waveform PHASE unification (reconstructed by isrc#recon/coeffWaveforms)

isrc/isrcload.c#h007.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-current-source.ts AcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl.load SINE value with phase (reconstructed by isrc#recon/coeffWaveforms)

isrc/isrcload.c#h008.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-current-source.ts AcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl.load SFFM waveform PHASE decls (reconstructed by isrc#recon/coeffWaveforms)

isrc/isrcload.c#h009.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-current-source.ts AcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl.load SFFM value with phasec/phases (reconstructed by isrc#recon/coeffWaveforms)

isrc/isrcload.c#h010.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-current-source.ts AcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl.load AM waveform PHASE decls (reconstructed by isrc#recon/coeffWaveforms)

isrc/isrcload.c#h011.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-current-source.ts AcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl.load AM value with phases (reconstructed by isrc#recon/coeffWaveforms)

isrc/isrcload.c#h012.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-current-source.ts AcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl.load PWL equality-test paren cleanup (reconstructed by isrc#recon/coeffWaveforms)

isrc/isrcload.c#h013.rationale: TRNOISE timezero-reset + no-noise-at-t0 state machine (isrcload.c:317-331). Requires the trnoise_state lifecycle (frozen construct trnoise-trrandom-state); TRNOISE/TRRANDOM ruled do-not-port (user 2026-06-03 — needs ngspice FFT f_alpha synthesizer). Sibling of the already-NC isrcload.c#h014 / isrcpar.c#h003/#h004.

isrc/isrcload.c#h014.rationale: TRNOISE source-waveform value arm of ISRCload: the timezero reset state machine + n1=floor(time/TS), V1=trnoise_state_get(state,ckt,n1), V2=...(n1+1), value=V1+(V2-V1)*(time/TS-n1)+RTS+DC 1/f-and-white interpolation. This is the trnoise_state noise subsystem, out of scope for a browser digital-logic simulator (user ruling 2026-06-02, ruled 3x). The trnoise_state lifecycle (trnoise_state_init/_get/_free, f_alpha 1/f synthesizer, timezero/top state, RTS trap) is tracked separately as the noise subsystem task (ESC-24-noise); maths-misc#recon/randnumb delivered only SeededRng primitives, not trnoise_state. NO-COUNTERPART: the TRNOISE/TRRANDOM source-waveform arms have no digiTS counterpart and are not reconstructed under isrc#recon/coeffWaveforms.

isrc/isrcload.c#h015.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-current-source.ts AcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl.load (the `ISRCcurrent = m * value` readout record at loadDone; the m multiplier is reconstructed by isrc#recon/parallelMultiplier, the recorded current is exposed via getPinCurrents)

isrc/isrcmdel.c#h001.rationale: Whole-file deletion of ISRCmDelete, a C-heap free unlinking an ISRCmodel from the model list and freeing its instances. Case (a) C-language artifact per PLANNING.md §5: digiTS is GC-managed; no model destructor, no model linked list.

isrc/isrcpar.c#h001.rationale: `switch(param)` -> `switch (param)` whitespace-only edit at the head of the ISRCparam IFparm setter. Pure C cosmetic; digiTS has no integer-keyed param setter switch (params applied via constructor/setParam from the property bag). PLANNING.md §5 case (a).

isrc/isrcpar.c#h002.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-current-source.ts AcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl constructor / setParam (ISRC_AC vector parse: acMag/acPhase + given flags; digiTS acMagnitude/acPhase defaults at ac-current-source.ts:309-312). The hunk's content is the /* FALLTHROUGH */ compiler-hint comments on the existing case-cascade

isrc/isrcpar.c#h003.rationale: TRNOISE source-waveform state re-init arm of ISRCparam: the `trnoise_state_free` of the prior state followed by trnoise_state_init on an `alter` command. This is the trnoise_state noise subsystem, out of scope for a browser digital-logic simulator (user ruling 2026-06-02, ruled 3x). The trnoise_state lifecycle (trnoise_state_init/_get/_free, f_alpha 1/f synthesizer, RTS trap state machine) is tracked separately as the noise subsystem task (ESC-24-noise); maths-misc#recon/randnumb delivered only SeededRng primitives, not trnoise_state. NO-COUNTERPART: the TRNOISE/TRRANDOM source-waveform arms have no digiTS counterpart and are not reconstructed under isrc#recon/coeffWaveforms.

isrc/isrcpar.c#h004.rationale: TRRANDOM source-waveform state re-init arm of ISRCparam: the `tfree` of the prior trrandom_state followed by trrandom_state_init on an `alter` command. This is the trrandom_state noise subsystem, out of scope for a browser digital-logic simulator (user ruling 2026-06-02, ruled 3x). The trrandom_state lifecycle (trrandom_state_init/_get) is tracked separately as the noise subsystem task (ESC-24-noise); maths-misc#recon/randnumb delivered only SeededRng primitives. NO-COUNTERPART: the TRNOISE/TRRANDOM source-waveform arms have no digiTS counterpart and are not reconstructed under isrc#recon/coeffWaveforms.

isrc/isrctemp.c#h001.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-current-source.ts AcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl constructor (model/instance linked-list-walk accessor-macro renames around the ISRCtemp default-value pass)

isrc/isrctemp.c#h002.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-current-source.ts AcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl constructor (no-value diagnostics rework: the ERR_WARNING->ERR_INFO `DC 0 assumed` path maps to digiTS default-current handling; the new `dc value used for op instead of transient time=0 value` check reads the transient time-0 value out of the coeff-array waveform - reconstructed by isrc#recon/coeffWaveforms)

isrc/isrcacld.c#h001a.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-current-source.ts AcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl.stampAc (accessor renames + m multiplier via isrc#recon/parallelMultiplier; the MODEACNOISE/noise_input excitation branch is split out as a NO-COUNTERPART sub-item - see Proposed splits in isrc-review.md §5)

isrc/isrcacld.c#h001b.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-current-source.ts AcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl.stampAc (accessor renames + m multiplier via isrc#recon/parallelMultiplier; the MODEACNOISE/noise_input excitation branch is split out as a NO-COUNTERPART sub-item - see Proposed splits in isrc-review.md §5)
isrc/isrcacld.c#h001b.rationale: MODEACNOISE / ckt->noise_input excitation branch. AC-noise analysis not implemented (isrc-review.md §1 / §5).

isrc/isrcacld.c#h001c.tsFunction: src/components/sources/ac-current-source.ts AcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl.stampAc (accessor renames + m multiplier via isrc#recon/parallelMultiplier; the MODEACNOISE/noise_input excitation branch is split out as a NO-COUNTERPART sub-item - see Proposed splits in isrc-review.md §5)

isrc#recon/coeffWaveforms.title: Rebuild the ngspice coeff-array independent-source waveform engine (ISRCcoeffs[]/ISRCfunctionType/ISRCfunctionOrder driving PULSE, SINE, EXP, SFFM, AM, PWL, TRNOISE, TRRANDOM) as the v26 baseline of ISRCload/ISRCaccept, in place of digiTS's own waveform set.
isrc#recon/coeffWaveforms.ngspiceBaseline: src/spicelib/devices/isrc/isrcload.c (ISRCload waveform switch), src/spicelib/devices/isrc/isrcacct.c (ISRCaccept breakpoint scheduling), src/spicelib/devices/isrc/isrcpar.c (coeff-vector + trnoise/trrandom state init), src/spicelib/devices/isrc/isrctemp.c (transient time-0 value derivation), src/spicelib/devices/isrc/isrcdefs.h (ISRCcoeffs/ISRCfunctionType/ISRCfunctionOrder fields + source-type ids)
isrc#recon/coeffWaveforms.tsFunction: AcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl.load / acceptStep / nextBreakpoint / constructor (replace the digiTS-native waveform set with the ngspice coeff-array engine)

isrc#recon/parallelMultiplier.title: Rebuild the `m` parallel-multiplier instance parameter (ISRCmValue/ISRCmGiven) on the independent current source, applied at every RHS stamp and AC-load stamp and to the recorded ISRCcurrent, as the v26 baseline.
isrc#recon/parallelMultiplier.ngspiceBaseline: src/spicelib/devices/isrc/isrcload.c (m = here->ISRCmValue; here->ISRCcurrent = m*value), src/spicelib/devices/isrc/isrcacld.c (m*acReal/m*acImag stamps), src/spicelib/devices/isrc/isrctemp.c (ISRCmValue default = 1.0 when !ISRCmGiven), src/spicelib/devices/isrc/isrcdefs.h (ISRCmValue field, ISRCmGiven flag), src/spicelib/devices/isrc/isrc.c (ISRC_M IFparm row)
isrc#recon/parallelMultiplier.tsFunction: AcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl (add `m` param + _M field; apply /multiply at load() RHS stamp, stampAc() AC stamp, getPinCurrents()) and DcCurrentSourceAnalogImpl (same)
